_comment: Reference description of the autonomous workflow. The LIVE schedule is owned by Windows Task Scheduler — register it with register_all_tasks.ps1. All times are Mountain Time (MDT/MST). Each routine runs scripts/orchestrator.py <mode>.

routines.name: Diagnostic (auto-heal)
routines.purpose: Health sweep + safe auto-fixes (JSON repair, learning reconcile, stale pid). Posts a Discord report.

routines.name: Morning Research
routines.purpose: Pull market data + indicators + regime + discovery, write the day's journal (synthesis).

routines.name: Trading Session
routines.purpose: Read the research journal, enforce stops, make + place validated decisions.

routines.name: Intraday Cycle
routines.purpose: Fresh live data: enforce stops, take/close positions, log to the journal.

routines.name: End of Day
routines.purpose: Reflection journal, refresh performance stats, post the detailed EOD report.

routines.name: After Hours
routines.purpose: Liquidate no-overnight names (UVXY), sync learning, post the detailed after-hours report.

routines.name: Crypto Cycle
routines.purpose: Scored 1-10 crypto system; partial profits; regime-aware sizing.

routines.name: Discord Bot
routines.purpose: Listens for !commands; !heartbeat runs a full live cycle.
